description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a long, cylindrical metal barrel and a wooden fore-end grip. The stock is made of wood with a smooth, slightly curved design for shoulder support, and the receiver is metallic, connecting the barrel and stock. The fore-end grip, also wooden, is ribbed for better handling and is positioned beneath the barrel, indicating a pump-action mechanism. The trigger guard is rounded and metallic, encasing a single trigger. The overall finish combines matte metal with polished wood, giving it a classic, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban or rural environments.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a long metal barrel, ribbed wooden fore-end, and a full wooden stock. The design is classic, with a mix of matte metal and polished wood surfaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the wooden stock, ribbed fore-end, and metallic barrel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the fore-end grip beneath the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the wooden stock and fore-end, with the metallic barrel and receiver visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the wooden stock and the linear alignment of the barrel and fore-end.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized metallic guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
